SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: RYAN SHEETS, ESQ. APPEARS ON BEHALF OF APPELLANT JULIAN WYLER, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY; MS. ANN FOUGERON APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HER OWN BEHALF AS THE RESPONDENT IN THIS CAUSE, FOUGERON ARCHITECTURE.

THE COURT HEARS ADDITIONAL ORAL STATEMENTS AND TESTIMONY BY BOTH SIDES AND THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.
